titlestmt.titleproper: Liberty Hyde Bailey, New York State College of Agriculture and Agricultural Experiment Station records21-2-84
titlestmt.author: Compiled by L. Grove

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-02-20 23:06:51 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Liberty Hyde Bailey, New York State College of Agriculture and Agricultural Experiment Station records
did.abstract: Director's files including correspondence, committee reports, and files concerning construction projects and the general administration of the college.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Director's files including correspondence, committee reports, and files concerning construction projects and the general administration of the college.
Also, signatures from students in appreciation to Liberty Hyde Bailey, 1908.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIAL
relatedmaterial.p: See also Liberty Hyde Bailey Papers, #21-2-3342 and Liberty Hyde Bailey Forestry Papers, #21-2-576.

arrangement.head: COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
arrangement.p: See accession folder for a list of original box file numbers used by the donor, and for a list of missing files.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Liberty Hyde Bailey, New York State College of Agriculture and Agricultural Experiment Station records, #21-2-84. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Agriculture -- Study and teaching.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture

did.unitdate: Sept. 6 - Oct. 15, 1906 (There are some items dated 1907)

did.unittitle: Experiment Station. Projects A-P 1906-08, 1912-1913 [Filed under names of experimenters]

F-l Director's Private Files. 1909-1914 Poultry letters; Grounds Comm. ; Landscape Art Dept.; Farm Practice and Farm Crops Dept.; Farm Bureau; County agents; Maintenance monies in other colleges , Agricultural College Council Minutes; Buildings

F-2 Director's Private File 1906-1914 Farm Bureau correspondence: & memoranda, U.S. Dept. of Agriculture, 1906-1908, student statistics, Rural Education, Resolution on College of Agriculture bills, 1910, publications
F-3 Director's Private Files 1907-1914 Old printing contracts, Poultry Dept., honor system, Alfred School, Morrisville School, miscellaneous publications
Signatures from students in appreciation to Liberty Hyde Bailey
